qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with height equal to '1.95' and name equal to 'Maurizio Felugo', having at least one related entrepreneur record (linked on people.people_id = entrepreneur.people_id) with money requested equal to '110000.0' and company equal to 'Elizabeth Galton Ltd'?

qa_pairs.question: Who born on 1972-02-06 has the name Roberto Calcaterra, weighs exactly 67.0, and is an entrepreneur with investor Peter Jones at the company IV Cam?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN entrepreneur ON people.people_id = entrepreneur.people_id
WHERE people.date_of_birth = '1972-02-06' AND people.name = 'Roberto Calcaterra' AND entrepreneur.investor = 'Peter Jones' AND entrepreneur.company = 'IV Cam' AND people.weight = 67.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with date of birth equal to '1972-02-06' and name equal to 'Roberto Calcaterra' and weight equal to '67.0', having at least one related entrepreneur record (linked on people.people_id = entrepreneur.people_id) with investor equal to 'Peter Jones' and company equal to 'IV Cam'?

qa_pairs.question: Which people born on or after 1977-04-28 have requested at most 54000.0 from the company Le Beanock?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN entrepreneur ON people.people_id = entrepreneur.people_id
WHERE people.date_of_birth >= '1977-04-28' AND entrepreneur.company = 'Le Beanock' AND entrepreneur.money_requested <= 54000.0
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which people entities with date of birth at least '1977-04-28', having at least one related entrepreneur record (linked on people.people_id = entrepreneur.people_id) with company equal to 'Le Beanock' and money requested at most '54000.0'?
